title: (devlog_01) - Why? How? and what's next.
content:
Intro
We’ve all felt it: that creeping realization that you can’t spend a 40-year career just moving data from a database to a UI. It felt repetitive and without any future prospects. Basically, I hit a crossroads. I didn't want easy & predictable anymore; I wanted hard. I wanted to find the kind of work that's unique, technically demanding, and pushes my potential past to my absolute limits.
Why I chose a game engine
I'm a huge gamer and making something in gamedev was obvious. In fact I've been yerning to create a game for almost 4 years. But why a game engine?
